title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host sheds light on the various customs and traditions followed by people across various states of India.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Raghav dodges Reet's question about his hatred for Neeta. Later, Sharda plots to reveal Unnati's secret while Fufaji plans a Valentine's Day party at home.

title: Vasudha
desc: Chandrika reassures Kavita about Vasudha's marriage. Meaanwhile, Madhav photographs Vasudha's eyes for a competition entry.

title: Meet
desc: Ahlawat penalises himself following a brutal beating from a grappler. Meanwhile, Meet retrieves him for nursing as Sunaina bickers with Tej.

title: Meet
desc: Shanty infiltrates the Ahlawat residence disguised as a spiritual leader. Meanwhile, he and his thugs plot Meet's murder as police arrive with a warning.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: Mahek, a talented and aspiring chef, enters a cooking competition to follow her passion. Her life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with Shaurya, the arrogant judge of the competition.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: AJ beats up the goons troubling Guddan and later brings her back home. However, he then declares that he intends to wed Shwetha and not Guddan, tearing up their agreement.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds.

desc: The party gets underway with Raghav, Reet, and Unnati's family in attendance. Later, a sense of unease settles in when one of Viren's friends makes Reet uncomfortable with his lewd gaze.

desc: Chandrika approves Madhav's logo design. Meanwhile, Gulki shoves Karishma into the pool, prompting Vasudha to inform Chandrika about Gulki's actions.

title: Meet
desc: A touching narrative of family bonds, personal growth, and everyday challenges, showing how two individuals learn to navigate life's pressures while holding onto hope and responsibility.
